perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue shirt, holds a plastic bag of Costco rotisserie chicken. She uses scissors to cut the bag open and gives a thumbs-up to the camera. (2) A series of close-up shots follow: white rice is poured from a bowl into the bag; chopped green onions are sprinkled in; shredded chicken is added with tongs; a spoonful of red chili oil is drizzled on top; finally, wooden chopsticks are used to mix the ingredients thoroughly inside the bag. (3) The woman is shown eating the prepared rice with a spoon, expressing satisfaction through wide eyes and smiles. She presents a close-up of the food on the spoon several times before concluding with another thumbs-up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with female vocals begins immediately. (2) Crisp sound effects (SFX) are layered over the music, corresponding to the visual cuts and actions like pouring rice and stirring the bag. (3) The music maintains its energetic tone throughout the tasting segment, with no spoken dialogue detected from the subject.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "COSTCO 好市多雞汁飯" (Costco Chicken Juice Rice) and "烤雞最新吃法" (New way to eat roast chicken) appear as a hook. (2) Functional Text: "步驟一 加入白飯" (Step 1 Add white rice), "步驟二 撒入蔥" (Step 2 Sprinkle green onions), "步驟三 加入雞肉" (Step 3 Add chicken), "步驟四 加一匙辣油" (Step 4 Add a spoonful of chili oil), "步驟五 攪拌雞肉飯" (Step 5 Stir chicken rice). (3) Decorative/CTA Text: "就完成囉！自製雞汁飯" (Finished! Homemade chicken juice rice) and "做法 很簡單喔 大家也來試試看吧!" (The method is simple, everyone try it!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Eating Experience -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue button-up shirt over a white tank top and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor kitchen setting with grey countertops and kitchen appliances visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a creative and easy recipe for 'Chicken Juice Rice' using Costco rotisserie chicken, aiming to provide culinary inspiration and engage the audience with a simple food hack.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Costco products are central to the video, it is presented as a user-generated 'hack' or vlog content rather than a paid promotional advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style captions and a fast-paced tutorial flow.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media trend of repurposing store-bought bulk items into new meals.
